description_long: This object consists of five vintage-style lanterns arranged in a row, each featuring a cylindrical metal body with a domed top and a prominent circular lens or opening at the front. Four of the lanterns are black, while the central one is a rusty brown, suggesting either a different material or significant weathering. Each lantern has a wire handle arching over the top, suitable for carrying or hanging, and a flat, rectangular handle at the back for gripping. The lanterns have a utilitarian, industrial appearance, with minimal decorative elements and a robust, functional design. The front face of each lantern is dominated by a large, round aperture, likely for projecting or focusing light. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for outdoor or urban use, such as on streets, railways, or in parks.
description: A row of five vintage metal lanterns, mostly black with one rusty brown, each featuring a domed top, wire handle, and large circular lens at the front. The design is robust and utilitarian, ideal for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular lenses or openings of all five lanterns, highlighting the color difference of the central lantern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the lanterns, the domed tops, and the wire handles arching above each lantern.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the flat, rectangular handles and the cylindrical bodies, with the color contrast of the central lantern still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the lanterns, the domed tops, and the wire handles, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
